title: Suvendu Adhikari’s net worth: No car, no gold, just ₹12,000 cash declared by BJP’s first-ever Bengal CM
description: Suvendu Adhikari’s net worth: In the election affidavit filed before contesting the West Bengal Election 2026, Suvendu Adhikari has declared ₹85.87 lakh net worth. This includes ₹24.57 Lakh movable and ₹61.30 Lakh immovable assets, as per declaration in the affidavit.
